keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $709.43 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $747.71 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $709.43 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: PLTR PUT — enter $5.35–$5.91, target $8.45+, stop $3.38.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -1.85% and SPY -0.48%. Composite sentiment -28 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, market breadth (a/d), spy trend. VIX at 15.53 (+1.07%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Energy (+3.85%) is leading while Consumer Discretionary (-1.63%) lags. Premarket strength in XOM, LLY; weakness in AMD, TSLA. The desk's highest-conviction setup is PLTR (6.3/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
